mapper.select: SELECT PLANT_NO FROM PLANT WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY PLANT_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.PLANT_NO , m.MEMBER_NAME , p.PLANT_NAME , p.CLASSIFICATION , p.PLANT_INFO , p.COUNT , p.CARBON_CAPTURE , p.CREATE_DATE , p.GROWTH_INFO , p.PLANT_API , p.DEL_YN FROM PLANT p JOIN MEMBER m USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE p.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY p.PLANT_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.PLANT_NO ,p.PLANT_NAME ,p.CLASSIFICATION ,p.COUNT ,p.CARBON_CAPTURE ,p.CREATE_DATE ,p.PLANT_INFO ,p.GROWTH_INFO ,m.MEMBER_ID ,p.PLANT_API FROM PLANT p Join MEMBER m USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE p.PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND p.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE PLANT SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo}
UPDATE PLANT SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
